import openpyxl

wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\(
    r"c:\\Users\\Incalza\\OneDrive - FASHIONKING\\Documentos\\Documentos Ernesto Gonzalez\\Programas\\Agente-Programación\\pespunte-agent\\data\\catalogo.xlsx",
    data_only=True
\)

print\("Sheet names:", wb.sheetnames\)
print\(\)

for sheet_name in wb.sheetnames:
    ws = wb[sheet_name]
    print\(f"\\n{'='*80}"\)
    print\(f"=== Sheet: {sheet_name} ==="\)
    print\(f"{'='*80}"\)
    print\(f"Dimensions: {ws.dimensions}"\)
    print\(f"Max row: {ws.max_row}, Max col: {ws.max_column}"\)

    # Show first 5 rows with all columns to understand headers
    print\("\\n--- First 5 rows \(all columns\) ---"\)
    for row in range\(1, min\(6, ws.max_row + 1\)\):
        vals = []
        for col in range\(1, min\(ws.max_column + 1, 20\)\):
            v = ws.cell\(row=row, column=col\).value
            vals.append\(f"C{col}={v}"\)
        print\(f"  Row {row}: {', '.join\(vals\)}"\)

    # Now show rows 6-50 focusing on columns 1-16
    print\("\\n--- Data rows 6-50 \(cols 1-16\) ---"\)
    for row in range\(6, min\(51, ws.max_row + 1\)\):
        vals = []
        for col in range\(1, 17\):
            v = ws.cell\(row=row, column=col\).value
            if v is not None:
                vals.append\(f"C{col}={v}"\)
        if vals:
            print\(f"  Row {row}: {', '.join\(vals\)}"\)

    # Collect ALL unique machine names from cols 8-15
    machines = set\(\)
    for row in range\(1, ws.max_row + 1\):
        for col in range\(8, 16\):
            v = ws.cell\(row=row, column=col\).value
            if v is not None and str\(v\).strip\(\):
                machines.add\(str\(v\).strip\(\)\)
    print\(f"\\n--- Unique values in cols 8-15 ---"\)
    for m in sorted\(machines\):
        print\(f"  {m}"\)

print\("\\n\\n" + "="*80\)
print\("GLOBAL SUMMARY"\)
print\("="*80\)

# Collect ALL unique machines across all sheets
all_machines = set\(\)
for sheet_name in wb.sheetnames:
    ws = wb[sheet_name]
    for row in range\(1, ws.max_row + 1\):
        for col in range\(8, 16\):
            v = ws.cell\(row=row, column=col\).value
            if v is not None and str\(v\).strip\(\):
                all_machines.add\(str\(v\).strip\(\)\)

print\(f"\\nALL unique machine/robot names across all sheets \({len\(all_machines\)} total\):"\)
for m in sorted\(all_machines\):
    print\(f"  - {m}"\)

wb.close\(\)
PYEOF)
